headline: ITW Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast
summary: GLENVIEW, Ill., April 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) will issue its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, ITW will hold its first quarter 2026 earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT. To access the webcast for the event, please click on the following link: ITW Q1 2026 Earnings Webcast If you are a participant on the conference call, please dial 1-888-660-6652 (domestic) or 1-646-960-0554 (international) 10 mi

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Illinois Tool Works, Lowers Price Target to $303
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $327 to $303.

headline: Illinois Tool Works Delivers 63rd Straight Dividend Hike, Nearly Tripling Payouts Since 2016
summary: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE: ITW) delivered its latest quarterly dividend of $1.61 per share on April 9, 2026, continuing a streak that few industrial companies can match. With 63 consecutive years of dividend increases, ITW sits firmly in the Dividend King tier, a distinction earned through decades of disciplined capital allocation and margin expansion. Here ... Illinois Tool Works Delivers 63rd Straight Dividend Hike, Nearly Tripling Payouts Since 2016
